name: should not log any errors on direct request success page
fullName: cypress/e2e/business/requests/direct-request-e2e.cy.ts#Business: Direct Request Success - Console Error Checks should not log any errors on direct request success page
statusMessage:
The following error originated from your application code, not from Cypress.

  > Failed to resolve module specifier "@src/monitoring/sentry/client". Relative references must start with either "/", "./", or "../".

When Cypress detects uncaught errors originating from your application it will automatically fail the current test.

This behavior is configurable, and you can choose to turn this off by listening to the `uncaught:exception` event.

https://on.cypress.io/uncaught-exception-from-application
